backend/main.mo: Minimal Motoko actor with no methods.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence listing feature specs, related files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries for many frontend files describing their purpose and behavior.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind styles defining light/dark OKLCH theme tokens and print rules.
frontend/index.html: Base HTML page bootstrapping the React app via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Configures TanStack router with all app routes wrapped in AppShell and MockStoreProvider.
frontend/src/components/ai/FloatingAIBut: Floating button that navigates to the AI page and exposes a coachmark target.
frontend/src/components/editor/AddQuesti: Dialog for creating a new question heading with title and planned count inputs.
frontend/src/components/editor/AutoGrowT: Textarea component that auto-resizes between min and max rows based on content.
frontend/src/components/editor/FloatingR: Floating draggable toolbox for desktop that lets users pick sections, headings, and add questions to a paper.
frontend/src/components/editor/MobileRea: Mobile-floating FAB toolbox providing section/heading selectors and question-type insertion with a modal-style card.
frontend/src/components/editor/RealPaper: Static sidebar toolbox for selecting sections and adding question types to a real paper.
Coachmark spotlight overlay highlighting the real paper toolbox and guiding users with a callout.
frontend/src/components/editor/RichCellE: Rich text and image editor for table cells supporting text editing, image paste/upload, and image property changes.
frontend/src/components/errors/AppErrorB: Global React error boundary displaying a fallback UI with reload and home navigation controls.
Handles global app routing, initialization, and layout, including redirects based on login and onboarding state. Shows loading and error screens and manages mobile navigation and coachmarks.
frontend/src/components/navigation/Navig: Renders the sidebar navigation with links and actions, including creating papers and logging out. Highlights active routes and triggers navigation callbacks.
frontend/src/components/onboarding/Coach: Displays a guided onboarding overlay positioned relative to a target element with retries and fallbacks. Supports navigation between steps and handles dynamic DOM updates.
frontend/src/components/paper/PaperActio: Provides an overflow menu for paper actions such as printing, exporting, sharing, and deleting. Includes share and delete dialogs and interacts with stored papers.
frontend/src/components/paper/PaperRende: Renders a question into printable HTML, including text, images, and type-specific layouts. Normalizes rich content and displays structured formats for all question types.
frontend/src/components/paper/PaperSurfa: Renders the full paper view with editable question blocks, autofocus logic, and navigation for adding questions from the bank or AI.
frontend/src/components/paper/QuestionBl: Provides an editor UI for individual questions, handling text, MCQ, and fill‑in‑the‑blank inputs with update and delete actions.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor tied to the user's identity, refreshing dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCoachmarks.ts: Controls onboarding coachmarks, managing step progression, activation triggers, and completion state.
frontend/src/hooks/useDebouncedEffect.ts: Runs an effect after a debounce delay to limit frequent updates.
frontend/src/hooks/useDraggableFloatingP: Adds draggable behavior and persisted position storage for floating UI panels, with viewport constraints.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides context and helpers for Internet Identity auth, including login, state tracking, and stored identity restoration.
frontend/src/hooks/useRealPaperToolboxSp: Tracks whether a toolbox spotlight has been shown using localStorage and exposes helpers to complete or reset it.
frontend/src/hooks/useTheme.ts: Manages theme state with localStorage and system preference syncing, applying the correct CSS class to the document root.
frontend/src/hooks/useUndoRedo.ts: Provides undo/redo state management with history tracking, limits, and optional change callbacks.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind layers and extensive light/dark theme CSS variables for the app’s color system and layout.
frontend/src/lib/ai/mockQuestionGenerato: Generates deterministic mock questions using cleaned topic strings and difficulty-based templates.
frontend/src/lib/editor/insertQuestionsI: Clones questions and inserts them into paper sections, assigning new IDs and appropriate heading references.
Handles rich cell content including text, images, size conversions, clipboard/file extraction, and normalization.
frontend/src/lib/editor/sectionInsertCon: Stores and retrieves the current section insert context in localStorage for question insertion workflows.
Converts a paper into plain text format and supports downloading it as a .txt file.
frontend/src/lib/ocr/extractedTextQuesti: Parses OCR text to detect questions using numbered, bullet, question-mark, and question-word patterns, and determines paragraph style. Returns parsed questions with confidence and text metrics.
frontend/src/lib/ocr/mockOcrExtractor.ts: Creates and manages OCR sessions, converting extracted text into questions using parsing and generation strategies, and stores sessions safely. Also converts OCR questions into app question objects.
frontend/src/lib/ocr/ocrQuestionGenerato: Generates structured questions from text by cleaning lines, extracting key terms, and forming MCQs, fill‑in‑the‑blank, and short‑answer items. Includes heuristics for validating lines and extracting phrases.
frontend/src/lib/ocr/ocrSpaceClient.ts: Client for OCR.space API that validates files, submits them for OCR, handles errors and limits, and returns extracted text. Converts files to base64 and processes API responses safely.
frontend/src/lib/papers/createNewPaper.t: Creates a new Paper object with default fields based on the user profile, initializing metadata and empty sections/questions.
frontend/src/lib/storage/questionDraftSt: Stores, loads, and clears per‑paper question drafts in localStorage using safe storage wrappers.
frontend/src/lib/storage/safeStorage.ts: Provides safe localStorage access with availability checks and error handling, offering get/set/remove utilities.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that initializes React, sets up QueryClient and Internet Identity providers, and renders the main App.
frontend/src/pages/ai/AIPreferencesWiref: UI for generating mock AI questions, selecting/editing them, and adding them to the question bank or inserting into a paper.
frontend/src/pages/auth/LoginWireframe.t: Login screen offering Internet Identity or guest login, with redirects based on onboarding status.
Loads and displays local draft items, handling storage errors and providing retry and navigation options.
frontend/src/pages/editor/PaperEditorWir: Paper editor with undo/redo, autosave, and section management, initialized from stored paper data.
frontend/src/pages/editor/QuestionEntryW: Form for creating questions with autosave drafts, undo/redo, and saving to bank or inserting into a paper.
frontend/src/pages/editor/RealPaperEdito: Full paper editing interface with section/heading selection, question operations, autosave, and toolbox UI controls.
frontend/src/pages/export/ExportPrintPre: Renders a print/export preview for a paper with options to clean layout, copy share links, download text, or print. Handles missing papers and updates layout mode via mock store.
frontend/src/pages/home/HomeDashboardWir: Displays the home dashboard with quick actions, recent papers, and navigation to create or open papers. Uses mock store state to initialize and manage papers.
frontend/src/pages/ocr/OCRReviewApproveW: Shows OCR‑extracted questions for review, allowing selection, approval to personal bank, or rejection. Loads and clears OCR sessions and navigates accordingly.
frontend/src/pages/ocr/OCRUploadWirefram: Provides an upload interface for images/PDFs, performs OCR extraction, handles errors, and stores results before navigating to review. Supports drag‑and‑drop and camera input.
frontend/src/pages/onboarding/Onboarding: Displays onboarding screen with tutorial start or skip options, updating onboarding state and navigating to home.
frontend/src/pages/papers/GeneratedPaper: Lists generated papers with edit, export, and delete actions, handling empty states and navigation. Formats dates and interacts with mock store for paper management.
frontend/src/pages/profile/ProfileWirefr: Teacher profile form allowing editing of default details and saving to the mock store.
frontend/src/pages/questionBank/Question: Question bank UI for browsing starter and personal questions, with insertion and editing support.
frontend/src/pages/settings/SettingsWire: Settings page for theme selection, tutorial reset, and clearing stored data.
frontend/src/state/mockData.ts: Defines profile, question, paper data models and provides default profile and starter questions.
frontend/src/state/mockStore.tsx: Mock state provider handling persistence, profile updates, paper management, and question CRUD operations.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration defining themes, colors, animations, and plugin setup.
project_state.json: JSON describing current project state, listing recent editor and question‑bank issues, required feature fixes, and known UI problems. Used to track fix requests, existing features, and outstanding issues for the system.
